name: Neon Night Pitch
tagline: Illustrative neon pitch deck with glowing outline type, youth-culture doodles, purple stage backgrounds, and poster-like title slides.

palette.description: deep navy and purple stage with orange, mint, and pink neon line work

typography.style: neon outline display with rounded pop body text

best_for: Event pitches, creator decks, nightlife concepts, youth brands, and decks that should feel loud, poster-like, and memorable.
avoid_for: Executive reports, sober B2B decks, medical/science decks, or restrained premium positioning.

source_inspiration.name: SlidesCarnival Minimalistic Neon Pitch Deck
source_inspiration.notes: Independent HTML/CSS interpretation based on public visual reference; not a pixel copy and does not reuse source assets.
